title: Prime Numbers
description: Given two integers n and m, list all prime numbers between n and m (inclusive), separated by spaces. If there are none, output -1.
inputSpec: Two integers n and m on a single line.
outputSpec: Space-separated list of primes in [n, m], or -1 if none exist.

botCodes.code:
def is_prime(n):
    if n < 2: return False
    for i in range(2, int(n**0.5)+1):
        if n % i == 0: return False
    return True

n, m = map(int, input().split())
primes = [str(x) for x in range(n, m+1) if is_prime(x)]
print(' '.join(primes) if primes else -1)
